testcase.name: Manage Skills - User Interface 01 Verify Manage Skills page loads for logged-in users
testcase.classname: 01 Verify Manage Skills page loads for logged-in users

testcase.name: Manage Skills - User Interface 02 Verify existing skills explicitly display in a list/table
testcase.classname: 02 Verify existing skills explicitly display in a list/table

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.skills-grid`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.skills-grid`, but never found it. at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/manage_skills_ui.cy.js:36:31)

testcase.name: Manage Skills - User Interface 03 Ensure all input fields and dropdowns are correctly rendered

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.page-header .btn-add-skill`, but never found it.

testcase.name: Manage Skills - User Interface 04 Verify capability to delete a skill seamlessly from the interface
